rows.label: tlk45400071_03_msg0001
rows.name:
I never got even a sip of Odifa.
That Holy See goddess has real sway.

rows.label: tlk45400071_03_msg0002
rows.name:
Leaving now would make
coming to Acedia pointless.
I just have to endure it.

rows.label: tlk45400071_03_msg0003
rows.name:
Once Acedia's people recover,
I'll drink my fill,
like bathing in it!
